creator: pawel@FreeBSD.org
text:
Dnia 2013-07-04, o godz. 21:38:29
Timur Bakeyev <timur.bakeyev@gmail.com> napisa=B3(a):

>That looks weird... Are you sure you have all the ports tree
>up-to-date?
>
>/usr/ports/net/samba-libsmbclient # pkg info -d
>samba36-libsmbclient-3.6.16 samba36-libsmbclient-3.6.16:
>        python27-2.7.5_1
>        tevent-0.9.18
>        talloc-2.0.8
>        libexecinfo-1.1_3
>        gettext-0.18.1.1_1
>        tdb-1.2.12,1
>        libiconv-1.14_1
>
>
>/usr/ports/net/samba-libsmbclient # make run-depends-list
>/usr/ports/converters/libiconv
>/usr/ports/databases/tdb
>/usr/ports/devel/libexecinfo
>/usr/ports/devel/talloc
>/usr/ports/devel/tevent

After package recompile it seems ok now. Sorry for the noise, it must
been something with my pkg installation then.

--=20
pozdrawiam / with regards
Pawe=B3 P=EAkala
